title: Facilities Technician
description:
Duties & Responsibilities   

  • Provide superior customer service to meet on-site client’s expectations

  • Vendor Management of maintenance providers in accordance with JLL’s vendor management guidelines.

  • Ensure staff, contractors and visitors comply with health and safety guidelines, policies and rules.

  • Responsibility for escorting vendors in a high security environment

  • Ensure full compliance with all security guidelines, policies and rules

  • Review contractor Permits & Safe Work Method Statements (SWMS) prior to works being undertaken on site

  • Assist to coordinate maintenance activities, including the efficient completion of Work Requests on database.

  • Assist to conduct site inspections and assessments to ensure all building procedures and performance measures are complied with

  • Seek ways to constantly improve operational standards

  • Support requests associated with Jones Lang LaSalle Management, Operations and Financial audits

Required Knowledge, Skills and Abilities

  • Very strong customer service ability

  • Must possess a demonstrated ‘can-do’ attitude and thrive on challenges;

  • Fluent English language required.

  • Able to cooperate and work well with others to meet targets;

  • Able to interact with the all levels client staff and vendors confidently and with ease, including senior client stakeholders

  • Goal-oriented – able to focus on meeting all performance targets;

  • Problem-solving skills – capacity to deal with ambiguity and solve complex problems effectively;

  • Able to work independently and responsibly with minimal supervision;

  • Prioritize and manage the completion of operational works in an efficient and timely manner;

  • Ability to quickly learn how to use any Company required software may be required;

  • Physically capable of performing tasks such as heavy lifting and ascending ladders.

  • Basic business finance knowledge an advantage.

postedCompany.description:
JONES LANG LASALLE PROPERTY CONSULTANTS PTE LTD

About Jones Lang LaSalle

Jones Lang LaSalle (NYSE:JLL) is a professional services and investment management firm offering specialized real estate services to clients seeking increased value by owning, occupying and investing in real estate. With annual revenue of US$4.0 billion, Jones Lang LaSalle operates in 70 countries from more than 1,000 locations worldwide. On behalf of its clients, the firm provides management and real estate outsourcing services to a property portfolio of 3.0 billion square feet. Its investment management business, LaSalle Investment Management, has US$47.6 billion of real estate assets under management.

Jones Lang LaSalle has over 50 years of experience in Asia Pacific, with over 27,500 employees operating in 80 offices in 15 countries across the region. The firm was named ‘Best Property Consultancy’ in three Asia Pacific countries at the International Property Awards Asia Pacific 2013, and won nine Asia Pacific awards in the Euromoney Real Estate Awards 2013. www.ap.joneslanglasalle.com
